title: Class 2 multi-turn refinement — user picks parent then refines bedroom (CLASS_1)
description: Deterministic scenario for the doc 11 multi-turn refinement path. Requires policy_table.global_constraints.class2_multi_turn_enabled=true (default false; opt-in feature flag). The user picks C1_LIGHTING_ASSISTANCE on the parent turn; because that candidate has a refinement template (refinement_templates._REFINEMENT_TEMPLATES['C1_LIGHTING_ASSISTANCE']), the manager returns a NEW ClarificationSession with refinement candidates {REFINE_LIVING_ROOM, REFINE_BEDROOM}. The user then picks REFINE_BEDROOM on the refinement turn, producing a terminal CLASS_1 result. The audit record carries refinement_history with one entry capturing the parent → child transition. Scenario asset only — does not authorize actuation.

steps.description: Publish an insufficient-context payload that drives the policy router into Class 2 with bedroom_light='off' so the refinement choice for bedroom resolves state-aware to action_hint='light_on'.
Class2ClarificationManager.start_session(input_mode='direct_select') initialises the parent session. candidate_choices includes C1_LIGHTING_ASSISTANCE which has a refinement template registered.

The user selects C1_LIGHTING_ASSISTANCE on the parent turn. The manager calls submit_selection_or_refine; because (a) class2_multi_turn_enabled=true, (b) the chosen candidate has a refinement template, and (c) the session is not itself a refinement, the manager returns a NEW ClarificationSession (not a terminal Class2Result). The new session has is_refinement_turn=True, parent_clarification_id set, parent_candidate_id='C1_LIGHTING_ASSISTANCE', refinement_question populated, candidate_choices=[REFINE_LIVING_ROOM, REFINE_BEDROOM] (state-aware per current device_states).

TTS announces the refinement question ('어느 방의 조명을 도와드릴까요?') followed by each per-room choice. Refinement turn timeout = class2_refinement_turn_timeout_ms (default 30000) — the turn is bounded to one user response.

The user selects REFINE_BEDROOM. The manager.submit_selection on the refinement session produces a terminal Class2Result with action_hint='light_on' (state-aware; bedroom_light='off') and target_hint='bedroom_light'.

Publish the terminal clarification record on safe_deferral/clarification/interaction. The record carries refinement_history=[{turn_index:1, parent_candidate_id:'C1_LIGHTING_ASSISTANCE', refinement_question:'어느 방의 조명을 도와드릴까요?', selected_candidate_id:'REFINE_BEDROOM', selection_source:'bounded_input_node', selection_timestamp_ms:...}]. transition_target='CLASS_1'.

The Deterministic Validator re-enters with the confirmed bounded candidate (action_hint='light_on', target_hint='bedroom_light'). The selection alone is not validator approval — validator gating still applies.

Observe the audit stream and capture: parent session selection, refinement session creation, refinement turn announcement + selection, terminal record with refinement_history. The integration verifier asserts (a) refinement_history length=1 (refinement is bounded to one turn max), (b) parent_candidate_id matches the parent selection, (c) selected_candidate_id matches the refinement turn's user pick, (d) terminal transition is CLASS_1.

transition_outcomes.condition: User picks parent C1_LIGHTING_ASSISTANCE then refines to REFINE_BEDROOM. Terminal CLASS_1 with state-aware action.
transition_outcomes.example_confirmation: C1_LIGHTING_ASSISTANCE on parent turn, REFINE_BEDROOM on refinement turn

notes: comparison_conditions tags 'class2_direct_select_input' because multi-turn refinement is currently exercised under the default direct_select interaction model. The opt-in IS the policy field class2_multi_turn_enabled (declared in multi_turn_refinement_expectation), not a comparison_condition value.

Multi-turn refinement (doc 11 Phase 6.0) is opt-in via policy_table.global_constraints.class2_multi_turn_enabled. Production deployments default to false (single-turn direct_select preserved); paper-eval flips this on per-trial.
Refinement is bounded to ONE turn (max). A refinement session never refines further — even if the picked refinement candidate matches another template (defensive guard in submit_selection_or_refine).

REFINE_BEDROOM's action_hint is state-aware: bedroom_light='off' in this scenario → action_hint='light_on'. If the scenario's input fixture had bedroom_light='on', the same candidate_id would carry action_hint='light_off'.
refinement_history captures the parent → child transition in a single record; the parent session's record is separate (not shown here).
transition_target='CLASS_1' is confirmed-candidate evidence; validator re-entry is required before any low-risk dispatch — selection ≠ validator approval invariant preserved.
